title: adenostegia filifolia
intro: Adenostegia filifolia, also known as the Kowhai bush or small kowhai, is a flowering shrub native to New Zealand and a member of the Fabaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Adenostegia filifolia include its potential to treat skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of Adenostegia filifolia include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally under the guidance of a healthcare practitioner.
